# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter the build command')
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter the test command')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter the deployment command')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_COMMAND) {
                        sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    } else {
                        echo "No build command provided"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.TEST_COMMAND) {
                        sh "${params.TEST_COMMAND}"
                    } else {
                        echo "No test command provided"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.DEPLOY_COMMAND) {
                        sh "${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
                    } else {
                        echo "No deployment command provided"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
